name: Blue Mitchell
description: '''Richard Allen '''"'''Blue'''"''' Mitchell''' (March 13, 1930 – May 21, 1979) was an American [[Trumpet|trumpeter]] and [[composer]] who worked in [[jazz]], [[rhythm and blues]], [[soul music|soul]], [[rock music|rock]], and [[funk]]. He recorded albums as leader and sideman for [[Riverside Records|Riverside]], [[Mainstream Records]], and [[Blue Note Records|Blue Note]]. He is also credited as the most recorded trumpeter with jazz [[Hammond organ|organ]], accumulating 27 sideman recordings in the genre.
